theme.background_style: Warm paper-like off-white with subtle grain
theme.glassmorphism_usage: High - used for overlays, story reader, and floating menus

typography.instructions: Import these fonts from Google Fonts in index.css

headings.usage: All titles, section headers, hero text. tracking-tight.

primary.description: Magical Indigo - Use for main CTAs and active states

secondary.description: Storyteller Amber - Use for highlights and secondary actions

accent.description: Safety Teal - Use for success states and safe/verified badges

background.description: Warm Paper - Not stark white. A very pale cream.

buttons.style: Pill-shaped, heavy shadow on hover, scale transform.
buttons.classes: rounded-full font-bold px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-xl active:scale-95 shadow-md

cards.classes: bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-[0_10px_40px_-10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] border border-slate-100 hover:shadow-[0_20px_60px_-15px_rgba(99,102,241,0.15)] transition-all duration-300

inputs.classes: h-12 rounded-xl border-2 border-slate-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary/20 transition-all bg-white

motion.instructions: Use standard Framer Motion variants. Don't over-animate. Focus on 'enter' animations and 'hover' feedbacks.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle SVG noise texture overlay on the main background with opacity 0.4.
visual_enhancers.decorations: Use floating 3D-ish blobs or shapes (circles, squiggles) in the background with absolute positioning.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Colored shadows! If the button is Indigo, the shadow should be a faint Indigo, not black.

hero_main.usage: Hero section main visual, potentially with a 'magic glow' overlay

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'framer-motion' and 'lucide-react'. Add the Google Fonts to index.css immediately.
2. THEME: Configure tailwind.config.js with the colors provided. Extend the theme, don't just replace.
3. LANDING PAGE: Build a 'Hero' component with the Glassmorphism card. Use the 'hero_main' image as a backdrop or side image.
4. COMPONENTS: Modify the standard Shadcn Button to be 'rounded-full' by default. This is a kid app, no sharp edges!
5. FORMS: When building the Character Builder, use big, chunky inputs and cards. 'Select' triggers should look like game UI buttons.
6. BACKGROUND: Implement the 'Warm Paper' background globally in index.css.
7. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to every interactive element (buttons, inputs, cards).
8. ANIMATION: Use <AnimatePresence> for route transitions if possible. Fade in all pages.
9. RESPONSIBLE AI: Make the Safety Dashboard look like a 'Superhero HQ' - use shields and green checks (Safety Teal).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Avoid generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. No default cyan/purple gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Do NOT center align the app container. No .App { text-align: center }.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
